creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
$ ld.lld -V
LLD 5.0.0 (FreeBSD 312559) (compatible with GNU linkers)
$ pkg -v
1.10.2

$ pkg install firefox mesa-dri
$ pkg delete -f glib
$ ln -fs ld.lld /usr/bin/ld
$ make install -C /usr/ports/devel/glib20
$ pkg check -d
